title: Mellow Portuguese Rye Bread
description: A hearty, anti-inflammatory-friendly Portuguese rye bread perfect for hangover cures or satisfying snacks.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine rye flour, whole wheat flour, and salt.
In a separate bowl, proof yeast by mixing it with warm water; let it sit for 5 minutes.
Add the yeast mixture to the dry ingredients and mix until a shaggy dough forms.
Knead the dough on a floured surface for 5-7 minutes, until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with plastic wrap, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Punch down the dough and shape it into a round or oblong loaf.
Place the loaf on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, sprinkle with caraway seeds and sesame seeds.
Bake the loaf in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until it's golden brown and sounds hollow when tapped on the bottom.
Brush the loaf with olive oil and drizzle with apple cider vinegar while still warm.
Let the loaf cool on a wire rack for at least 30 minutes before slicing and serving.
